parameters.query:
SELECT
  e.event_id,
  e.session_id,
  e.known_id AS email,
  e.created_at,
  e.risk_score,
  e.risk_flags,
  fs.event_data AS form_data
FROM events e
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT event_data
  FROM events fs2
  WHERE fs2.session_id = e.session_id
    AND fs2.event_type = 'form_submit'
    AND fs2.created_at <= e.created_at
    AND (fs2.event_data->>'email' = e.known_id OR fs2.event_data->>'email' IS NULL)
  ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN fs2.event_data->>'email' = e.known_id THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    fs2.created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
) fs ON true
LEFT JOIN odoo_sync_log osl ON osl.event_id = e.event_id
WHERE e.event_type = 'identity_linked'
  AND (
    osl.event_id IS NULL
    OR (osl.status = 'pending' AND osl.updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes')
  )
ORDER BY e.created_at ASC
LIMIT 50

INSERT INTO odoo_sync_log (id, event_id, email, status, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  gen_random_uuid(),
  '{{ $json.event_id }}',
  '{{ $json.email }}',
  'pending',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (event_id) DO NOTHING;

SELECT
  CASE WHEN osl.status = 'pending' THEN true ELSE false END AS was_inserted,
  osl.event_id,
  osl.email,
  e.risk_score,
  e.risk_flags,
  fs.event_data AS form_data
FROM odoo_sync_log osl
JOIN events e ON e.event_id = osl.event_id
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT event_data
  FROM events fs2
  WHERE fs2.session_id = e.session_id
    AND fs2.event_type = 'form_submit'
    AND fs2.created_at <= e.created_at
  ORDER BY fs2.created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
) fs ON true
WHERE osl.event_id = '{{ $json.event_id }}'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', method: 'call', params: { model: 'mail.message', method: 'create', args: [{ res_id: ($('Search Lead HTTP').item.json.result || [{}])[0].id, model: 'crm.lead', message_type: 'comment', subtype_xmlid: 'mail.mt_note', body: $('Build Bodies').item.json.revisitNote }], kwargs: { context: {} } } }) }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE odoo_sync_log
SET status = 'duplicate',
    odoo_lead_id = {{ ($('Search Lead HTTP').item.json.result || [{}])[0].id || 0 }},
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE event_id = '{{ $("Build Bodies").item.json.event_id }}';

UPDATE odoo_sync_log
SET revisit_count = revisit_count + 1,
    last_submission_at = NOW(),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = (
  SELECT id FROM odoo_sync_log
  WHERE email = '{{ $("Build Bodies").item.json.email }}'
    AND status = 'created'
  ORDER BY created_at ASC
  LIMIT 1
);

UPDATE odoo_sync_log
SET status = 'created',
    odoo_lead_id = {{ $json.result }},
    last_submission_at = NOW(),
    risk_score = {{ $("Build Bodies").item.json.riskScore || 0 }},
    risk_flags = ARRAY[{{ $("Build Bodies").item.json.riskFlags ? $("Build Bodies").item.json.riskFlags.map(f => `'${f}'`).join(',') : '' }}]::TEXT[],
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE event_id = '{{ $("Build Bodies").item.json.event_id }}'

UPDATE odoo_sync_log
SET status = 'error',
    error_message = '{{ $json.message || $json.error }}',
    attempts = COALESCE(attempts, 0) + 1,
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE event_id = '{{ $("Build Bodies").item.json.event_id || $("Was Claimed?").item.json.event_id }}'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', method: 'call', params: { db: $env.ODOO_DB, login: $env.ODOO_LOGIN, password: $env.ODOO_PASSWORD } }) }}
